insight: For Paraguay, the hydration breaks in the 2026 World Cup have been a consistent factor in maintaining their momentum, with the team gaining momentum in both of their two hydration breaks. This suggests that the breaks have not disrupted their rhythm, and they have been able to pick up where they left off after the brief pause. The numbers also indicate that whether Paraguay was pressing or not before the break, they were able to maintain their average momentum, with no significant change in their performance. Overall, the hydration breaks have had a neutral to slightly positive effect on Paraguay's gameplay, allowing them to continue playing at their existing level without any notable decline.
